name: Bold Colour. Grounded Confidence.
details:
Product Description

Make every look stand out with the Prism Hematite Rice Chain Bracelet—a bold fusion of vibrant colour, contemporary design and meaningful crystal energy.

The bracelet features five glossy Prism Hematite beads arranged at the centre. Each bead reflects shifting tones of purple, blue, green and gold, creating an eye-catching multicolour finish. The beads are paired with matching geometric rice-shaped links, giving the entire bracelet a sleek and coordinated appearance.

Hematite is traditionally associated with grounding, focus, emotional balance, stability and inner strength. StuddMuffyn’s existing Hematite collection also positions the crystal around mental clarity, discipline and a steady mindset, making this bracelet suitable for work, travel, meetings and everyday wear.

The adjustable extension chain allows a flexible fit, while the lobster clasp provides a secure closure. Its colourful metallic finish makes it easy to wear as a standalone statement piece or layer with other minimal bracelets.

Key Features
Five polished Prism Hematite beads
Multicolour purple, blue, green and gold reflections
Matching rainbow-tone geometric rice links
Adjustable extension chain
Secure gold-tone lobster clasp
Lightweight and comfortable construction
Suitable for men and women
Ideal for everyday and occasion styling
Hematite Benefits
Traditionally associated with grounding and stability
Supports a focused and disciplined mindset
Encourages mental clarity and concentration
Promotes emotional balance
Symbolises inner strength and confidence
Helps the wearer feel centred during demanding situations

StuddMuffyn describes Hematite as a crystal associated with grounding, focus, emotional balance, strength and stability. Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and mindful intention; they are not medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.

Product Specifications

Product Type: Crystal Rice Chain Bracelet
Crystal Used: Prism Hematite
Number of Beads: 5
Bead Shape: Round
Bead Finish: Polished multicolour metallic finish
Chain Style: Geometric rice-link chain
Chain Colour: Prism/rainbow tone
Closure: Lobster clasp
Fit: Adjustable
Gender: Unisex
Style: Bold, contemporary and colourful
Country of Origin: India

Ideal For

Daily wear, office styling, travel, parties, concerts, gifting and anyone who prefers modern crystal jewellery with a colourful statement finish.

Care Instructions

Keep the bracelet away from water, perfume, sweat, lotions and harsh chemicals. Wipe it gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store it separately in a jewellery pouch or box. Avoid scratching the metallic surface against rough objects to preserve its prism finish.
